feature_flags: default
real_type: f64
operation_sequence: invalid Profile primitive parameter catalog -> finite-coordinate filter -> triangulate when finite
input_coordinates: zero/negative/sub-tolerance shape dimensions and segment counts
metadata: varied shape labels
expected_behavior: Constructors either return empty/finite sketches or are contained for later regression.
observed_behavior: Some invalid parameter combinations can create NaN coordinates.
normalized_geometry_summary: generated outputs are filtered for finite coordinates before downstream triangulation.
